caption: A man sits in a studio setting, wearing a black baseball cap, a black t-shirt with the text "CHECK IT!" on the chest, and a gold chain. He is wearing grey over-ear headphones and speaks into a professional microphone positioned in front of him. In the background, a white wall features the words "BOSS TALK 101" and "HUSTLE" alongside small gold stars. Several graphic overlays are visible on the screen, including a logo on the left that reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" and another on the right that reads "BOSS TALK 101". Across the sequence of frames, the man remains in a stationary seated position, subtly shifting his head and facial expression as he talks, while the background and on-screen graphics remain constant.
